title: Plastic Storage Box with Lid, 2 x 3 Tier Stackable Small Storage Boxes, Classroom Desk Organiser Ideal for Storing Stationery, Craft Organiser, Small Pieces, Jewellery, Tools and Art Equipment
features: Convenient Design: The storage box has a lid with a handheld handle, ensuring the safety of the items inside and allowing for easy stacking and disassembling. This makes it an ideal solution for organizing your stationery collection while maximizing your storage space.

Durable Material: Made of high-quality PP plastic, the plastic box with lid is both sturdy and lightweight, ensuring long-lasting use even under heavy use conditions. Its waterproof and dustproof design ensures that your items stay protected, while the transparent design makes it easy to locate the items you need.

Versatile Storage: The stackable storage boxes offer three levels of organization, making it perfect for storing a wide range of items, from pens and pencils to small office supplies. The additional space provided by the case's stackable design allows you to keep your workspace tidy and well-organized.

This Package Includes: 2 clear plastic storage boxes with lids, 1 in light pink and 1 in light grey. Each box comes with two snap-on locking clip, total two removable lid that can be freely combined as needed. The really useful pencil box measures 21.5cm x 10cm x 20.5cm. The dimensions of the single layer are 21.5cm x 10cm x 4cm.

Wide Range of Applications: Whether you're looking to organize your personal or professional stationery collection like pencils, brushes, watercolors, markers, etc. The plastic box with lid is a versatile solution that can be used in a variety of settings. Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, making it a great gift option as well.
description: Product Description Multifunctional Pencil Case The pen storage boxes are easy to sort and organize, the storage boxes can be labeled accordingly. The locking clip of the plastic storage box makes it opens and closes easily without spilling the contents. Stackable Pencil Box This rectangular plastic pencil case box is made of high quality PP plastic that is durable and not easily damaged, and the pencil box has a reinforced pattern on the bottom to prevent the bottom from cracking. Plastic Pencil Case Box The compact mini storage box is lightweight and portable. Take a pencil case transparent in backpack or bag to school or work without anything falling out. Pen Storage Boxes The edge of the lid is reinforced for extra security, organiser has snap-on lids and handles to keep the contents safe. You don't have to worry about accidentally losing anything. STACKABLE & COMPACT DESIGN Stackable and compact design saves space and keeps your desk neat and organised. You can store more small items. TRANSPARENT & EASY TO IDENTIFY Our stylish translucent pencil boxes feature translucent plastic design that allows you to easily identify the inside of the pencil case. PRACTICAL, VERSATILE PENCIL BOX Pencil storage boxes with lids Ideal for storing pencils, rulers, scissors, learning supplies, office supplies, art supplies, crafts, embroidery floss, kitchen utensils, Lego parts and more. Anstore 2 x 3-Tier Stackable Storage Boxes with Handle Practical Sorting Box for Crafts, Jewelry, Toy, Sewing Accessories Product description: Material: PVC Colour:Light gray, light pink and clear Size: Single layer of dimensions:21.5cm x 10cm x 4cm ; Three layers of dimensions:21.5cm x 10cm x 10.5cm Package Content: 2 x 3 Tier Storage Box
